title: Mr. Madras
desc: When an industrialist struggles to stand up to a local criminal, she hires a desperate young man in need of a job to settle the dispute. However, once the task is completed, she dismisses him from the job.

title: Arusuvai Neram
desc: A prominent chef demonstrates his culinary skills by preparing a variety of delicious vegetarian recipes and provides tips and suggestions.

title: Gamma Gamma Malai
desc: An eminent culinary expert shares various recipes and demonstrates the process of cooking it step by step, along with providing valuable tips.

title: News
desc: The host provides the latest information, advancements, and developments regarding various political, economic and social issues.

title: Krishna Cottage
desc: A group of youngsters who are neighbours soon become the best of friends as they get to know each other better. While they get into hilarious situations, they also face life one day at a time.

title: Jeyyam
desc: Bringing the best in television.

title: Kai Rasi Kudumbam
desc: A joint family based in Kanchipuram faces several challenges and hurdles every day, but tries to overcome them with each other's help and support.

title: Kanavugal Aayiram
desc: Five close friends from various backgrounds face various challenges as they work towards their goals, stand up for each other and make the most of their lives.

title: Rudhram
desc: An archaeologist's visit to Mahendragiri Malai leads to mysterious events at Karkoda Kakeswarar temple years later. After deaths occur, a writer investigates the supernatural occurrences.

title: Hit List
desc: A curated collection of famous songs written and performed by renowned musicians as well as artists, is played in rapid succession.

title: Aranmanai Kavalan
desc: Sakthi takes upon himself to protect and fight for every Tamilian thriving in Mumbai. When he meets the wife of the late community-chief, he makes up his mind to resolve her family issues.

title: Suprabhatam
desc: Devotees chant the 'Suprabhatam', a devotional verse part of Hinduism, invoking the Almighty and offering their heartfelt prayers.

title: Kandhashastikavasam
desc: A comprehensive compilation of religious hymns and devotional songs in praise of Lord Murugan written by various artists.

title: Arul Neram
desc: Devout priests in various temples conduct sacred rituals and prayers to praise and worship various deities in the Hindu faith.

title: Kaalai Malar
desc: The host interviews various prominent personalities from different fields and discusses in detail their works and future plans.

title: Thenkinnam
desc: The host presents a comprehensive compilation of old Tamil film songs composed and performed by various talented artists and singers.

title: Idhu Namma Bhoomi
desc: Gopi loves Nalini, but her father, Rathnavel, opposes their marriage due to an old feud with Gopi's father, Jaganathan. Determined to bring peace, Gopi resolves to reunite the two estranged families.
